zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Fitz Rogers於大約1507年出生在英國多瑟特布陽斯頓時，他的父親John Rogers40歲，母親Catherine Courtenay37歲。他於1526年與Katherine Weston在英國英格蘭多瑟特布陽斯頓結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1565年8月16日在英國英格蘭波克夏巴爾可特享年59歲，埋葬在英國多瑟特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Fitz Rogers于大约1507年出生在英国多瑟特布陽斯頓时，他的父亲John Rogers40岁，母亲Catherine Courtenay37岁。他于1526年与Katherine Weston在英国英格兰多瑟特布陽斯頓结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1565年8月16日在英国英格兰波克夏巴爾可特享年59岁，埋葬在英国多瑟特。

nameMeanings.name: Rogers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Roger , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: adopted for Gaelic Mac Ruaidhrí (see Rorie ).

History: Thomas Rogers (c. 1587–1621), born in London, England, was among the Pilgrim Fathers who sailed on the Mayflower in 1620. He died during the first winter at Plymouth Colony, but his son Joseph survived and married, and was later joined in MA by his brother John. This name was subsequently brought to North America independently by many different bearers.

variants.name: Roger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philippe, Alcee, Armand, Laurent, Leonce, Marcel, Yves, Clovis, Fernand, Gilberte, Janvier, Jean Claude.

Scottish, English, North German, French, Walloon, Catalan, and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements hrōd ‘renown’ +gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’, which was introduced into England by the Normans in the form Rog(i)er and was reinforced by the Old Norse cognate Hróthgeirr.

History: Gabriel Roger from Sainte-Verge in Deux-Sèvres, France, married Marie (de) Lacour in Quebec City, QC, in 1669. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Rodgers
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Rogers  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Fitz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Fitz Rogers was born about 1507, in Bryanston, Dorset, England, his father, John Rogers, was 40 and his mother, Catherine Courtenay, was 37. He married Katherine Weston in 1526, in Bryanston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 16 August 1565, in Barcote, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Dorset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Fitz Rogers est né environ 1507, à Bryanston, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, John Rogers, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Catherine Courtenay, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Weston en 1526, à Bryanston, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 16 août 1565, à Barcote, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Dorset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Fitz Rogers um 1507 in Bryanston, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Rogers 40 und seine Mutter Catherine Courtenay 37. Er hat 1526 in Bryanston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Katherine Weston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 16. August 1565 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Barcote, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dorset, England begraben.

Lui sposato Katherine Weston nel 1526, nel Bryanston, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 16 agosto 1565, nel Barcote, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Dorset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Fitz Rogersが約1507年にイギリスドールセトブリアンストンで生まれた時，父John Rogersは40歳，母Catherine Courtenayは37歳であった。1526年にイギリスイギリスドールセトブリアンストンでKatherine Westonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1565年8月16日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアバーコトで59歳で死去し，イギリスドールセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Fitz Rogers(이)가 대략 1507년 영국 도르세트 브라이아스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Rogers(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Courtenay(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1526년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브라이아스턴에서 Katherine Weston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1565년 8월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 바컷에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 도르세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Fitz Rogers nasceu aproximadamente 1507, em Bryanston, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Rogers, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Courtenay, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Weston em 1526, em Bryanston, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 16 de agosto de 1565, em Barcote, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Dorset, Inglaterra.

ro.St Bees, Cumberland, England, United Kin: St Bees, Cumberland, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Fitz Rogers родился около 1507 г. в местности брянстон, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Rogers было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Courtenay, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Weston в 1526 г. в местности брянстон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер около 16 августа 1565 г. в местности баркот, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности дорсет, Англия.

Se casó con Katherine Weston en 1526, en Bryanston, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 16 de agosto de 1565, en Barcote, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Dorset, Inglaterra.
